expectations.text: Type hints on ALL function signatures
expectations.evidence: Most functions typed: _ready() -> void, take_damage(amount: int, from_direction: Vector2) -> void, etc. Variable types also mostly explicit.
Signals declared at lines 43-44, AFTER @export vars (L7-23) and state vars (L27-39). Should be: signals first after extends.
Uses flat @export with comments (# Movement, # Combat) instead of @export_group()/@export_category()
Uses var sprite: Sprite2D = null then get_node_or_null() in _ready(). Creates timers programmatically in _ready() instead of @onready.
Uses Input.get_axis() (acceptable) but falls back to raw Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_A/D/W/S) on lines 100-107
Uses Godot 4.x syntax: CharacterBody2D, @export, create_tween(), callable connections

expectations.text: Incoming damage uses BOTH area_entered AND overlap polling
expectations.evidence: No hurtbox for incoming enemy damage at all. take_damage() exists as public method but no Area2D detection for receiving enemy contact damage.
